# Documentation

## P14e Directory Api

- [Creating Requests](https://developer.pingidentity.com/p14e-directory-api/create-requests.md)

- [Functional Overview](https://developer.pingidentity.com/p14e-directory-api/functional-overview.md)
- [Group Actions](https://developer.pingidentity.com/p14e-directory-api/group-actions.md)
- [Group Membership Count](https://developer.pingidentity.com/p14e-directory-api/group-membership-count.md)
- [Group Resources](https://developer.pingidentity.com/p14e-directory-api/group-resources.md)
- [Handling Errors](https://developer.pingidentity.com/p14e-directory-api/handle-errors.md)
- [Handling Responses](https://developer.pingidentity.com/p14e-directory-api/handle-responses.md)
- [PingOne for Enterprise Directory API](https://developer.pingidentity.com/p14e-directory-api/index.md)
- [Previous Releases](https://developer.pingidentity.com/p14e-directory-api/release_notes/docset-release-notes.md)
- [Reading a Resource](https://developer.pingidentity.com/p14e-directory-api/read-resource.md)
- [Resetting a Password](https://developer.pingidentity.com/p14e-directory-api/reset-password.md)
- [Resetting a Password by Email](https://developer.pingidentity.com/p14e-directory-api/reset-password-by-email.md)
- [Updating a Resource](https://developer.pingidentity.com/p14e-directory-api/update-resource.md)
- [User Actions](https://developer.pingidentity.com/p14e-directory-api/user-actions.md)
- [User Authentication](https://developer.pingidentity.com/p14e-directory-api/user-authentication.md)
- [User Invitation](https://developer.pingidentity.com/p14e-directory-api/user-invitation.md)
- [User Registration Notifications](https://developer.pingidentity.com/p14e-directory-api/user-registration-notifications.md)
- [User Resources](https://developer.pingidentity.com/p14e-directory-api/user-resources.md)
